segments.text: while there are priests who give baptism to you.
This baptism and that baptism is in juxtaposition
In the same way, when Kundalini rises
Kriya-yog takes place within ourselves
something goes into kriya – action
The action is that when Kundalini rises
it's a tremendous force that is rising
And its very unique
and the whole body is prepared for that. And when it rises, a kind of a wave action takes place in
like the parasympathetic movement we have where you digest our food at the same time
When Kundalini rises some sort of muscular contraction take places
which keeps the recent kundalini upward then it dilates
it opens up and then it contracts.
All these things take place automatically within ourselves
as we start the car, every machinery starts working
in same way that kriya takes actually within us
so the Kriya takes places with Sahaja Yoga
or a subsidiary to Sahaj yoga means yoga itself
but all this thing takes place inside of us
But on the contrary do one think without starting
the car, you can start moving the wheel. Kriya Yoga, so on. So that is a juxtaposition with
a real kriya yoga which spontaneous built in within us – You don't have to do anything
but you are meant for it! I've seen people their tongues
are cut and wagging there tongue very old people from India I've caught this somebody
He cut their tongue and the tongues are wagging like this.
They're useless people, one doctor was like that – one doctor, a seeker!
I said why did he do it?
We were supposed to do Khechari but Khechari is where you put your tongue back
And try touch his backside with the tongue tip
These things have ruined the path of…
I have seen the kumarini being hurt, wounded, tosses her head on sides.
In ego of man he thinks that can and I'll go to any extent do it – forget it!
It's so simple just like an enlightened light.
Enlightened candle can enlighten another candle
That works out in a very simple way
Don't move all these things towards yourself
If you are real seeker
Just Forget
Don't ruin yourself. There's nothing needed to ruin yourselves, this is done because they are early seekers and their ego is pampered that you can do it – then go ahead!
Inside your heart You don´t have anything till Your very last like the people who dont know how to swim
Are told keep silent we will try bring them into shore
So they are brought to the show, they're taught how to swim
and then they save people.
You don't have do anything till you get your realization
in a mastery over it unless until you become the master
or not doing any thing
It takes hardly anytime
Its too good to be there
Everything that is perfect
looks like this isn´t it?
Shall we have an experience now
You want to slip their shoes off?
Yes, not for shoes.
I mean even there people have an argument with Me why shoes you see
so I better give explanation otherwise
again they'll stand up and say why shoes
because we are so identified in them
You see shoes these days in modern times especially
if the way you see your souls will not lay down but something else
And they insulate you
as it is shoes do insulate from Mother Earth
and to take the help of Mother Earth, we have taken off our shoes.
But even that upset people you know can imagine
but if ask them cut their hands they don't mind
They want it absolutely when it is sad
It has be extremely sad
That why God took out his shoe
Isn´t interesting
The way We are
There's such a play
Be in cheerful mood there nothing serious going on here
Just take your shoes thats all
Now put Your hand towards Me please just like this
